title: Purchase less than 3 seats

posts.author: julietwrites (Juliet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I understand Monday.com is a “team collaboration” but there are also users, like myself, who benefit from using Monday.com solo. Giving customers the option to select 1 or 2 seats at a lower monthly/yearly cost would benefit the users and the platform.

What are you trying to achieve

Users would like the option to select 1 or 2 seats for a monthly/yearly subscription.
